idea-plugin.name: Klikor IDE Bridge
idea-plugin.description:
Klikor IDE Bridge

Lets you control this IDE directly from the Klikor desktop app: run/debug configurations, step commands, and any other IDE action, triggered from Klikor buttons and macros.

Zero-config: install this plugin, point a Klikor button at the action ID you want (use Help | Open Action Browser to find and copy IDs, including third-party plugins' actions), and it works.

Klikor IDE Bridge is a rebrand of JetBrains' open-source intellij-streamdeck-plugin (originally built as the backend for the Elgato Stream Deck IntelliJ integration), licensed under Apache-2.0. It speaks the same local HTTP action-execution protocol, so it is a drop-in replacement if you were previously using the JetBrains Stream Deck plugin with Klikor.

Note: this plugin doesn't support Gateway/JetBrains Client so far.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.2.0
- Supports IntelliJ Platform 2026.2 and newer (sinceBuild 262), tracking upstream's fix for IDE 2026.2+ compatibility (ActionTreeGroupUtil keymap API). Install this version if your IDE is 2026.2 or later; Klikor IDE Bridge 1.1.0 remains available for IDEs 2025.2-2026.1, and 1.0.0 for IDEs 2024.3-2025.1.
1.1.0
- Supports IntelliJ Platform 2025.2 through 2026.1 (sinceBuild 252, untilBuild 261.*), tracking upstream's fix for IDE 2025.2+ compatibility. Install this version if your IDE is 2025.2-2026.1; Klikor IDE Bridge 1.0.0 remains available for IDEs 2024.3-2025.1, and 1.2.0 for IDEs 2026.2 and newer.
1.0.0
- Initial Klikor IDE Bridge release, forked from JetBrains' intellij-streamdeck-plugin (Apache-2.0).
- Same local/remote action-execution HTTP protocol as the upstream plugin (drop-in compatible with Klikor).
- "Perform action only when IDE window is focused" now defaults OFF, since Klikor buttons are expected to trigger IDE actions without stealing focus.

action.description: Open Action Browser to view and copy action id infos
